topPicks.title: t_game_bangbang
topPicks.desc: Wild West Bang Bang is a high-octane 2D-in-3D arcade shooter where you step into the boots of a legendary sheriff. Battle through 10 levels of increasing intensity, neutralizing menacing outlaws while sparing innocent civilians. Face a formidable final boss, chain massive combos, and etch your name onto the high-score leaderboard. Featuring visceral damage feedback, procedural western audio, and a convenient auto-reload toggle, this experience blends classic arcade action with modern polish. Strap on your holster, sharpen your aim, and prove you're the fastest gun in the territory!

topPicks.desc: puzzle game with a clever twist. Based on the mathematical theory behind plank puzzles, consists of a grid of cubes and rods which can be rotated with a swipe. Turn the activated cubes to reach the end cube and win the level.
